narrative:
Amherst City has 9,358 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.2 percentage points.
